overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The player traverses covered commercial walkways, passes massive industrial ventilation fans, crosses busy streets, and ascends to an elevated pedestrian overpass with panoramic views of the bustling cyberpunk metropolis below.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial arcade with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered commercial arcade, observing neon signs and holographic displays on surrounding buildings

entered.detail: overhead covered walkway structure with integrated lighting
large glowing holographic display of a human head on building facade
multiple vertical neon signs with Asian characters and brand logos
tall glass and steel building with illuminated windows and advertisements
metal railings with yellow reflective strips separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered commercial arcade bathed in neon light. Holographic advertisements and glowing signage cover the surrounding buildings. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by street railings, with sparse pedestrian traffic visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial-commercial mixed street with massive ventilation infrastructure

events.description: massive industrial ventilation fans with green internal lighting come into view on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street while passing the large industrial ventilation structure on the right

entered.detail: massive circular ventilation fans with green glowing interiors and metal housing
curved building facade with blue neon 'AI' signage and medical clinic branding

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an industrial-commercial mixed zone where massive ventilation fans dominate the right side of the street, glowing with green light. The AI clinic building becomes visible ahead as the camera moves past the holographic advertisements from the previous section.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with AI clinic and street-level vendors

events.description: crossing the street while following a pedestrian wearing a red jacket
approaching the illuminated stair structure with pink neon trim leading to the overpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while following a pedestrian in a red jacket, then approaching the stair structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead toward the stair structure

entered.detail: bright blue neon sign reading '24/7 STORE' on building facade
multi-level stair and escalator structure with prominent pink neon lighting along edges

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide-open intersection with moderate pedestrian traffic. After crossing the street following a pedestrian in a red jacket, the scene approaches a prominent stair structure illuminated with pink neon lights. The 24/7 store sign glows on the left while vehicles pass by on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian stairwell and overpass entrance

events.description: entering the covered stairwell structure and beginning ascent to the overpass level
transitioning from pink neon stair lighting to fluorescent ceiling lights in the overpass corridor

agents.ego_description: ascending the stairs while following the pedestrian in red, entering the covered overpass structure

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with square fluorescent light panels
metal railings with integrated yellow neon lighting strips
enclosed pedestrian walkway with advertisements on walls

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered stairwell and begins ascending, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed environment. The lighting shifts from vibrant pink neon to utilitarian fluorescent ceiling panels. Other pedestrians are seen descending the stairs as the camera climbs toward the overpass level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with panoramic city views through windows

events.description: emerging from the stairwell into the main overpass walkway with window views of the street below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated overpass, looking out through windows at the street traffic and cityscape below

entered.detail: large angled windows providing views of the street and buildings below
view of moving traffic and pedestrians on the street level seen through overpass windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in the elevated overpass walkway, where large windows reveal the bustling street below. The camera moves forward along the concrete walkway, observing the cityscape from above while fluorescent lights illuminate the interior. The view through the windows shows moving traffic and the neon-lit buildings of the downtown district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-drenched commercial arcade into a wide, bustling city intersection. It begins by gliding along a concrete sidewalk within a covered walkway, where holographic advertisements and glowing signage bathe the surroundings in vibrant light. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into an industrial-commercial zone dominated by massive, green-glowing ventilation fans and the looming facade of an AI clinic. The scene then opens into a wide intersection filled with passing vehicles and pedestrians, following a figure in a red jacket across the street. Finally, the camera approaches a prominent stair structure illuminated by pink neon lights, passing a glowing 24/7 store sign as it enters the heart of the city.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from a vibrant street level into an elevated, enclosed pedestrian walkway overlooking the city. It begins as the camera enters a covered stairwell, transitioning from the open air into a confined space where the lighting shifts from pink neon to utilitarian fluorescent panels. As the camera climbs past descending pedestrians, the enclosed stairwell opens up into a wide, concrete overpass. The scene then expands along this elevated corridor, where large windows reveal a panoramic view of moving traffic and neon-lit skyscrapers in the downtown district below.
